name: Cherree
description:
Cherree is the drunken wine mom of your two favorite skunk twins Ava and Quinn, she comes to your home while the girls are away, and wants to see her daughters, but when she’s stuck with you, and doesn’t want to leave, maybe you can become more friendly with this skunk woman~
___

**OC**

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**! *I’ll usually be on around 6-9 at night and mornings! Cant wait! In the discord we have many fun things, from just discussing topics, to ideas for new bots, and even sharing spicy art~*: ➡️**https://discord.gg/EcmkSGwQpz**⬅️

___

*Hey all my stinkers! Omg, I’m so sorry for the long waits with bots! With finals in school coming up, I’ve just been to busy, but don’t yall worry! Winter break I’ll be popping out a few bots back to back! Love you all! 🎄💚💚*
